# Silicon Valley Realtors

> Luxury real estate brokerage serving Silicon Valley and the broader Bay Area — Palo Alto, Atherton, Menlo Park, Los Altos Hills, Woodside, Saratoga, Los Gatos, Cupertino, Mountain View, Sunnyvale, San Francisco, Marin, and the East Bay.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, video walkthroughs, MLS search, featured properties, team.
- [Properties](/properties): Live MLS search across all Silicon Valley cities with city, price, and bedroom filters.
- [Buyers](/buyers): Buyer representation, search consultation, and offer strategy.
- [Sellers](/sellers): Seller concierge — staging, marketing, cinematic video, pricing strategy.

## Specialties

- Luxury and ultra-luxury residential
- Eichler and mid-century modern homes
- Probate, foreclosure, and short sales
- VA and assumable loans
- 1031 exchanges
- Senior assisted-living transitions
- Nationwide relocation
